backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the DroneWash Dashboard defining all core data types (Job, Expense, Quote, Invoice, Fund, Contract, etc.) and persistent state for a drone washing business management system with access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three related features that remove PDF attachment UI and the usePdfAttachments hook from FundsManagement.tsx, restoring transaction rows to their pre-PDF state.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the DroneWash QuotePro Admin Dashboard, mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Internet Identity authentication, handling loading/error screens, profile setup, data migration, and lazy-loading the Dashboard.
frontend/src/components/AddFundTransacti: Modal dialog component for adding inflow or outflow transactions to a specific fund, with form fields for amount, type, category, and description, wired to the useAddFundTransaction mutation.
frontend/src/components/AddGoalDialog.ts: Modal dialog component for creating new business goals with fields for description, target metrics, target date, and milestone tracking, using the useAddGoal mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddInvestmentTra: A dialog component for adding investment fund transactions (payments or allocations) with fields for amount, transaction type, allocation type, and description. Submits via the `useAddInvestmentFundTransaction` mutation and shows toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/AddMaintenanceEx: A dialog component for logging maintenance expenses that first creates an expense record then adds a corresponding ledger entry to deduct from the maintenance fund balance. Validates sufficient fund balance before submission and invalidates related React Query caches on success.
Renders memoized bar and line charts for monthly revenue/expenses and profit projections using Recharts and data from custom query hooks. Includes error handling with a retry button and loading state management.
frontend/src/components/ArchivedInvestme: A static informational component that notifies users the old archived investments feature has been replaced by a new Investment Fund system. Provides a button to navigate to the Investment Fund tab.
frontend/src/components/BackupVersionsDi: A dialog that lists locally stored backup versions with options to download (as JSON) or delete each version. Displays version metadata including timestamp and estimated data size.
frontend/src/components/COGSSettings.tsx: A settings panel for configuring Cost of Goods Sold parameters such as van fuel rates by city, generator fuel rate, additional pilot fee, and chemicals cost per hour. Saves configuration to localStorage and shows a save button when unsaved changes exist.
frontend/src/components/ContractsManagem: A full CRUD management UI for contracts, allowing admins to create, edit, delete, and filter contracts by name/status, with support for standardized services, area tiers, and agreed pricing.
frontend/src/components/CreateFundDialog: A dialog form for creating a new financial fund with fields for fund type, name, initial balance, spending limit, and approval threshold.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForms.t: Provides forms and tables for adding, editing, and deleting jobs and expenses, with inline edit/delete dialogs and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/DataMigrationHan: Handles one-time migration of jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, and goals from localStorage to the backend, showing progress and errors in a dialog.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: A reusable alert dialog component that prompts the user to confirm a delete action, with a loading state while deletion is in progress.
frontend/src/components/EditExpenseDialo: A dialog form for editing an existing expense's amount, date, category, and additional info, submitting updates via the useUpdateExpense hook.
frontend/src/components/EditFundDialog.t: A dialog component for editing an existing fund's name, balance, spending limit, approval threshold, and active status, using the useUpdateFund mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/EditJobDialog.ts: A dialog component for editing a job's client name, revenue, date, and sector, using the useUpdateJob mutation with toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/components/ErrorPanel.tsx: A reusable card component that displays an error message with an optional retry button using a destructive alert style.
frontend/src/components/ExpensesManageme: A full expense management UI with search, category filtering, bulk selection, edit, and delete capabilities, displaying filtered expenses in a table with totals.
frontend/src/components/FinancialMetrics: Displays key financial metrics (revenue, profit, fund balances) as expandable cards with fund editing and transaction dialogs, using memoized calculations for performance.
A tabbed funds management page showing operational funds, transactions, transfers, and alerts, with support for creating, editing, deleting funds and adding transactions.
frontend/src/components/InvestmentFundMa: Displays an investment fund overview with summary cards (initial capital, current balance, total payments, total allocations) and a transaction history table. Admins can add new transactions via a dialog.
Provides a form for creating invoices by selecting a quote and entering customer details, then generates and downloads a PDF invoice on success.
frontend/src/components/InvoicesList.tsx: Lists all invoices in a filterable, searchable table with options to download PDFs, toggle paid/pending status, and delete invoices (admin-only for delete).
frontend/src/components/JobCalendar.tsx: Renders a monthly calendar view of scheduled jobs, allowing navigation between months and clicking a job to open a details dialog.
frontend/src/components/JobDetailsDialog: A dialog for viewing and editing job details (customer info, financial fields) that restricts editing to admin users and submits updates via the useUpdateJob mutation.
frontend/src/components/KPIWidgets.tsx: Displays four KPI cards (Net Profit Trend, Job Completion, VAT Due, and a fund delta) by deriving metrics from financial, jobs, and invoices query hooks.
frontend/src/components/LoadingPanel.tsx: A simple card component that shows a spinning loader and a configurable message while data is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceManag: Renders a maintenance management section with fund balance, inflow/outflow summaries, and an expense log table, with an admin-only button to add new maintenance expenses.
frontend/src/components/MobileNav.tsx: A slide-out sheet navigation menu for mobile viewports that lists all app tabs and conditionally includes a Settings item for admins.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyReports.t: Provides a monthly report view with month/year selectors, displays revenue and goal metrics, and supports CSV export and print functionality.
frontend/src/components/PricingManagemen: Admin panel for viewing and editing tiered service rates across five cleaning service types, saving changes back to the backend via the setServiceRate mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name, email, and role (admin or viewer) on first launch and passes the data to a parent callback.
A React component that provides a multi-step quote calculator for cleaning services, computing pricing tiers, COGS breakdowns (fuel, chemicals, pilot costs), VAT, volume discounts, and add-ons before saving the quote via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/QuotesList.tsx: A React component that displays, filters, and manages saved quotes with search/sector/service filters, cost breakdown calculations, and PDF export options for both client-facing and internal views.
frontend/src/components/ReportingSection: A React component that displays unit economics summaries and provides export buttons for cash flow and unit economics reports in CSV and PDF formats using job and expense data.
frontend/src/components/UserPreferencesD: A dialog component that lets users configure dashboard preferences such as dark mode, layout, and metric filters, persisting them via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) using the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePdfAttachments.ts: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend data operations including user profiles, jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, funds, contracts, and backups, with BigInt serialization helpers and configurable stale times.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates customer-facing quote and invoice PDFs by opening a new browser window with styled HTML and triggering the print dialog, with helpers for formatting service rates and totals.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Generates cash flow reports in CSV and PDF formats by combining and sorting job revenue and expense transactions, calculating a running balance, and triggering a browser download or print window.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page component that renders a tabbed interface with all major sections (overview, jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, funds, contracts, analytics, reports) and handles data preloading, backup, and role-based access.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page component that presents a branded card with an Internet Identity login button, handling login state and error toasts.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration that loads canister IDs from canister_ids.json and .dfx/local, injects them as environment variables, sets up a React plugin, path aliases, and a dev-server proxy to the local ICP replica.
project_state.json: Project state metadata (version 15) describing an expense/fund management app, recording a revert to v44 to remove all PDF-attachment work added in v45–v49 and restore the last stable baseline.
